news.title:
Balkrishna Industries sets record date for Rs. 100 Cr CP redemption on 12th Mar 2026.
The commercial paper matures on 13th Mar 2026; investors notified for actions.
news.summary:
Balkrishna Industries sets record date for Rs. 100 Cr CP redemption on 12th Mar 2026.
The commercial paper matures on 13th Mar 2026; investors notified for actions.

news.title:
Balkrishna Industries Ltd received CARE AA Stable rating for Rs. 750 crore NCDs.
The NCDs have a tenure of 5 years with repayments starting in the 3rd year.
news.summary:
Balkrishna Industries Ltd received CARE AA Stable rating for Rs. 750 crore NCDs.
The NCDs have a tenure of 5 years with repayments starting in the 3rd year.

news.title: Balkrishna Industries' board approved fundraising via ₹750 crore debentures.
news.summary: Balkrishna Industries' board approved fundraising via ₹750 crore debentures.

news.title: CRISIL reaffirmed Balkrishna Industries' ratings, citing strong credit profile and stable performance.
news.summary: CRISIL reaffirmed Balkrishna Industries' ratings, citing strong credit profile and stable performance.

news.title:
Balkrishna Ind. saw volumes surge 43.9x to 3.05L shares, stock down 2.3% at Rs.2459. Eternal Ltd surged 29.5x to 1035.22L shares, up 1.5% at Rs.254.
Tejas Networks rose 8.4% to Rs.344.65 with 25.8x volume increase. EID Parry gained 0.6% at Rs.871, Angel One dropped 1.9% to Rs.244.30, both with volume spikes.
news.summary:
Balkrishna Ind. saw volumes surge 43.9x to 3.05L shares, stock down 2.3% at Rs.2459. Eternal Ltd surged 29.5x to 1035.22L shares, up 1.5% at Rs.254.
Tejas Networks rose 8.4% to Rs.344.65 with 25.8x volume increase. EID Parry gained 0.6% at Rs.871, Angel One dropped 1.9% to Rs.244.30, both with volume spikes.

news.title:
Balkrishna Industries will hold a Finance Committee meeting on 2nd March 2026.
The meeting will consider raising funds via non-convertible debentures privately.
news.summary:
Balkrishna Industries will hold a Finance Committee meeting on 2nd March 2026.
The meeting will consider raising funds via non-convertible debentures privately.

news.title:
Balkrishna Industries enters the consumer tyre market, diversifying from its OHT niche.
The company targets ₹23,000 crore topline by FY30 through scale and brand investment.
news.summary:
Balkrishna Industries enters the consumer tyre market, diversifying from its OHT niche.
The company targets ₹23,000 crore topline by FY30 through scale and brand investment.

news.title:
Balkrishna Industries commissioned a new tyre line producing 800 tyres/day with Rs. 750 Cr investment.
Power plant capacity rose to 64 MW; expansion is part of Rs. 3,500 Cr Bhuj capex plan.
news.summary:
Balkrishna Industries commissioned a new tyre line producing 800 tyres/day with Rs. 750 Cr investment.
Power plant capacity rose to 64 MW; expansion is part of Rs. 3,500 Cr Bhuj capex plan.

news.title:
Balkrishna Industries surged 17.45%, from Rs.2305.85 to Rs.2708.15, outperforming Sensex's 1.5% rise.
The stock saw a gap-up and upper circuit on 3 Feb, indicating technical strength and renewed buying interest.
news.summary:
Balkrishna Industries surged 17.45%, from Rs.2305.85 to Rs.2708.15, outperforming Sensex's 1.5% rise.
The stock saw a gap-up and upper circuit on 3 Feb, indicating technical strength and renewed buying interest.

news.title: Balkrishna Industries gains up to 20% amid India-US trade agreement.
news.summary: Balkrishna Industries gains up to 20% amid India-US trade agreement.

news.title:
Balkrishna Industries executed an NSE block trade of ~81,979 shares at Rs. 2492.6 each.
The transaction's total value amounted to Rs. 20.43 crores.
news.summary:
Balkrishna Industries executed an NSE block trade of ~81,979 shares at Rs. 2492.6 each.
The transaction's total value amounted to Rs. 20.43 crores.

news.title:
Balkrishna Industries Ltd shared audio recording of Q3/9MFY26 results call.
The recording is available on the company's website for investor access.
news.summary:
Balkrishna Industries Ltd shared audio recording of Q3/9MFY26 results call.
The recording is available on the company's website for investor access.

news.title:
Balkrishna Industries' Q3 FY26 net profit drops 21.2% YoY to ₹273.2 crore.
Sequential profit fell 5.2% from Q2 FY26 due to margin pressures.
news.summary:
Balkrishna Industries' Q3 FY26 net profit drops 21.2% YoY to ₹273.2 crore.
Sequential profit fell 5.2% from Q2 FY26 due to margin pressures.

news.title:
L&T posted mixed Q3 results with net profit at ₹3,215 crore, down 4.3% YoY; revenue rose 10.5% YoY but missed estimates.
SBI Cards saw net profit rise 45.3% YoY to ₹556.6 crore, with total spends up 33% YoY; M&M Fin and Balkrishna posted mixed results.
news.summary:
L&T posted mixed Q3 results with net profit at ₹3,215 crore, down 4.3% YoY; revenue rose 10.5% YoY but missed estimates.
SBI Cards saw net profit rise 45.3% YoY to ₹556.6 crore, with total spends up 33% YoY; M&M Fin and Balkrishna posted mixed results.

news.title:
Balkrishna Industries declares 3rd interim dividend of ₹4 per share.
This move is aimed at rewarding shareholders.
news.summary:
Balkrishna Industries declares 3rd interim dividend of ₹4 per share.
This move is aimed at rewarding shareholders.

news.title:
Balkrishna Industries reports Q3 FY25 revenue of ~Rs 2,730 crores and PBT of ~Rs 483 crores.
Declared interim dividend of Rs 4/share; continues intended use of commercial paper proceeds.
news.summary:
Balkrishna Industries reports Q3 FY25 revenue of ~Rs 2,730 crores and PBT of ~Rs 483 crores.
Declared interim dividend of Rs 4/share; continues intended use of commercial paper proceeds.

news.title:
Balkrishna Industries held a postal ballot for three resolutions, including reappointment of Mr. Arvind Poddar as Chairman & MD.
All resolutions, including appointments of independent and non-independent directors, were approved with requisite majority via e-voting.
news.summary:
Balkrishna Industries held a postal ballot for three resolutions, including reappointment of Mr. Arvind Poddar as Chairman & MD.
All resolutions, including appointments of independent and non-independent directors, were approved with requisite majority via e-voting.

news.title:
Balkrishna Industries Ltd. will hold a board meeting on Jan 28, 2026, to approve Q3 FY26 financial results.
The board will also consider declaring the 3rd interim dividend for FY25-26, payable on Feb 2, 2026, if approved.
news.summary:
Balkrishna Industries Ltd. will hold a board meeting on Jan 28, 2026, to approve Q3 FY26 financial results.
The board will also consider declaring the 3rd interim dividend for FY25-26, payable on Feb 2, 2026, if approved.

news.title:
Balkrishna Industries reappoints Chairman & MD for 5 years from Aug 2026.
Approves ₹3,500 Cr capex for 3 years; completes Carbon Black line (265,000 TPA).
news.summary:
Balkrishna Industries reappoints Chairman & MD for 5 years from Aug 2026.
Approves ₹3,500 Cr capex for 3 years; completes Carbon Black line (265,000 TPA).

news.title:
ICICI Direct highlights seven stocks, including Coforge, Gokaldas Exports, and Balkrishna Industries, as beneficiaries of the India-US trade deal.
Rollback of US tariffs could unlock export volumes; the portfolio focuses on smaller, export-driven firms with 70.1% small-cap exposure.
news.summary:
ICICI Direct highlights seven stocks, including Coforge, Gokaldas Exports, and Balkrishna Industries, as beneficiaries of the India-US trade deal.
Rollback of US tariffs could unlock export volumes; the portfolio focuses on smaller, export-driven firms with 70.1% small-cap exposure.
